vars.transcript:
REP: How are things going at Meridian Health?
PROSPECT: Busy. We're mid-migration and our CISO is pushing this security project at the same time.
REP: That sounds like a lot to manage simultaneously.
PROSPECT: It is. Honestly I'm not sure we have the bandwidth to evaluate a new vendor right now.
REP: What would make the timing work better?
PROSPECT: If you could prove quick time-to-value — like, up and running in under two weeks — that would help.

REP: We can get you compliant before Q2.
PROSPECT: *leans back in chair* That's an interesting claim. *pauses thoughtfully* We've heard that before from vendors who couldn't deliver.
REP: What happened with the previous vendor?
PROSPECT: *sighs* It's a long story. They missed the implementation timeline by three months.

description: Bracket tone markers in prospect turns

vars.transcript:
REP: Our platform is used by 200 healthcare systems.
PROSPECT: [skeptically] That's a big claim. What does 'used by' mean exactly — active users or just licensed?
REP: Active — daily detections running.
PROSPECT: [slightly warmer] Okay that's more meaningful. Can you share some customer references in our segment?

description: System (INTERRUPTED) marker — should NOT be flagged

vars.transcript:
REP: The implementation timeline is—
PROSPECT: (INTERRUPTED) Sorry, I have to ask — is this HIPAA certified out of the box or does that require configuration?
REP: Out of the box, HIPAA and SOC 2.
PROSPECT: Good. That was my main concern.

description: Natural spoken expressions — not stage directions

vars.transcript:
REP: How confident are you that you can get this budget approved?
PROSPECT: Hmm... honestly, maybe 60/40 in favor. My CFO is cautious.
REP: What's her biggest hesitation typically?
PROSPECT: Ha, where do I start. She wants everything in a spreadsheet with ten-year projections.
